message:
feat(core): generated column extraction, REGEXP/MATCH codegen, overflow guard, conformance updates

Generated columns in schema parsing:
- `build_table_schema` now extracts `Generated { expr, storage }` column
  constraints and populates `ColumnInfo.generated_expr` / `generated_stored`,
  wiring the AST representation through to the VDBE codegen layer.
- All `ColumnInfo` construction sites updated with the new fields.

REGEXP/MATCH operator support:
- `emit_like_expr` no longer errors on MATCH and REGEXP operators; they are
  now emitted as function calls (`match()` / `regexp()`), deferring to
  user-defined functions at runtime (matching SQLite's model).
- `evaluate_having_value` returns NULL for REGEXP (parity: SQLite errors
  if no regexp function is registered).
- `eval_join_expr` returns an explicit error for REGEXP instead of
  silently returning false.

EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN:
- `IdxLE` and `IdxLT` opcodes are now recognized as scan-boundary opcodes
  in the EQP tree builder.

Snapshot shipping overflow guard:
- `BlockResumeState::decode` uses checked arithmetic for `n_isis * 4 + 10`
  to prevent integer overflow on corrupt data.

Conformance test updates:
- Un-ignore conformance_042 (AUTOINCREMENT after delete) and
  conformance_044 (ORDER BY column index) — both now pass.
- Add `#[ignore]` to conformance_058 correlated subquery tests with
  updated reason string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -485,6 +485,8 @@ pub fn parse_columns_from_create_sql(sql: &str) -> Vec<ColumnInfo> {
                 unique: upper.contains("UNIQUE") || (is_ipk && upper.contains("PRIMARY KEY")),
                 default_value: None,
                 strict_type,
+                generated_expr: None,
+                generated_stored: None,
             })
         })
         .collect()
@@ -753,6 +755,8 @@ mod tests {
                     unique: false,
                     default_value: None,
                     strict_type: None,
+                    generated_expr: None,
+                    generated_stored: None,
                 },
                 ColumnInfo {
                     name: "name".to_owned(),
@@ -763,6 +767,8 @@ mod tests {
                     unique: false,
                     default_value: None,
                     strict_type: None,
+                    generated_expr: None,
+                    generated_stored: None,
                 },
             ],
             indexes: Vec::new(),
@@ -914,6 +920,8 @@ mod tests {
                     unique: false,
                     default_value: None,
                     strict_type: None,
+                    generated_expr: None,
+                    generated_stored: None,
                 }],
                 indexes: Vec::new(),
                 strict: false,
@@ -930,6 +938,8 @@ mod tests {
                     unique: false,
                     default_value: None,
                     strict_type: None,
+                    generated_expr: None,
+                    generated_stored: None,
                 }],
                 indexes: Vec::new(),
                 strict: false,
@@ -1022,6 +1032,8 @@ mod tests {
                 unique: false,
                 default_value: None,
                 strict_type: Some(StrictColumnType::Integer),
+                generated_expr: None,
+                generated_stored: None,
             }],
             indexes: Vec::new(),
             strict: true,

@@ -158,6 +158,8 @@ pub fn explain_query_plan(program: &VdbeProgram) -> Vec<EqpRow> {
             | Opcode::SeekLT
             | Opcode::IdxGE
             | Opcode::IdxGT
+            | Opcode::IdxLE
+            | Opcode::IdxLT
             | Opcode::Rewind
             | Opcode::Last
             | Opcode::Next
